name: tx-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, motions, affidavits/unsworn declarations, notices of hearing, and proposed orders for Texas courts. Covers the Texas Rules of Civil Procedure form requirements (TRCP 45/47/57, the Rule 47(c) statement of relief, e-filing via eFileTexas under TRCP 21(f)); Harris County and Dallas County District Courts, a statewide District / County-Court-at-Law roll-up, the Justice of the Peace (Justice Court) layer under TRCP Part V (Rules 500–510), and Smith County (Tyler) Justice Court specifically; plus a family-court venue skill. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (TRCP civil rules — incl. the Rule 99 'Monday rule' answer deadline, no-evidence summary judgment 166a(i), sworn-account 185 / verified-denial 93, Rule 91a dismissal, discovery-control-plan Levels 1/2/3; Tex. R. Evid.; fees and costs; deadlines under TRCP 4 + Tex. Gov't Code § 662.003 holidays; citation per the Texas Rules of Form / Greenbook) plus subject-matter bundles: tx-consumer-debt (FDCPA / Reg F / Texas Debt Collection Act Fin. Code Ch. 392 / DTPA / chain-of-title) and tx-family-law (community property, SAPCR, Ch. 154 child support, Ch. 153 conservatorship). Drift-prone dollar amounts, caps, and day counts live in the reference corpus, not the skill bodies. All workflows are skills (no slash commands), invoked automatically from natural-language requests.
